steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The reduced map is 70% shorter, so it keeps 30% of the original side length. Both maps cover the same territory, so a shorter map means more miles per inch. The new scale = original scale ÷ 0.30.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 4.20: This is 14 × 0.30, applying the shrink factor instead of inverting it. ✗
  • Choice B — 8.24: This is 14 ÷ 1.7, treating the reduced map as 70% longer instead of 70% shorter. ✗
  • Choice C — 44.80: This is 64 × 0.70, the amount of side length removed in inches, not the scale. ✗
  • Choice D — 46.67: 14 ÷ 0.30 = 14 × (10/3) = 140/3 ≈ 46.7. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
